std-agent-activity-log.name: std-agent-activity-log
std-agent-activity-log.description: Chronological action log atom for tracking agent operations. Provides a timeline view of agent actions with status indicators, duration tracking, and clear functionality. Listens for LOG_ENTRY events from sibling traits.

std-agent-chat-thread.name: std-agent-chat-thread
std-agent-chat-thread.description: Chat message thread atom for agent conversations. Displays a chronological list of messages (user, assistant, tool) with compose/send flow. Emits configurable send event for orchestrating traits to handle the actual agent call.

std-agent-classifier.name: std-agent-classifier
std-agent-classifier.description: Classification flow atom for agent-powered text classification. Composes UI atoms (stdModal for input form, stdNotification for result badge) with an agent trait that uses agent/generate with a classification prompt.

std-agent-completion.name: std-agent-completion
std-agent-completion.description: Completion flow atom for agent text generation. Composes UI atoms (stdModal for prompt input, stdNotification for feedback) with an agent trait that handles agent/generate and retry logic.

std-agent-context-window.name: std-agent-context-window
std-agent-context-window.description: Context window management atom for agent token tracking. Composes UI atoms (stdAgentTokenGauge for visual display, stdNotification for threshold alerts) with an agent trait that handles agent/compact, agent/token-count, and agent/context-usage.

std-agent-conversation.name: std-agent-conversation
std-agent-conversation.description: Conversation flow atom for multi-turn agent interactions. Composes stdAgentChatThread (message display and compose) with an agent trait that handles agent/generate for AI replies and TOKEN_UPDATE emitting.

std-agent-memory.name: std-agent-memory
std-agent-memory.description: Memory lifecycle atom for agent memory operations. Composes UI atoms (stdBrowse for memory table, stdModal for memorize form) with an agent trait that handles agent/memorize, agent/recall, agent/pin, agent/forget, agent/reinforce, and agent/decay operators.

std-agent-provider.name: std-agent-provider
std-agent-provider.description: Provider routing atom for agent model/provider switching. Composes UI atoms (stdModal for switch form, stdNotification for confirmation) with an agent trait that handles agent/switch-provider, agent/provider, and agent/model operators.

std-agent-search.name: std-agent-search
std-agent-search.description: Code search flow atom for agent-powered codebase searching. Composes stdBrowse (results table) with an agent trait that handles agent/search-code.

std-agent-session.name: std-agent-session
std-agent-session.description: Session lifecycle atom for agent session management. Composes UI atoms (stdBrowse for session list, stdModal for fork label form) with an agent trait that handles agent/fork, agent/label, and agent/session-id.

std-agent-step-progress.name: std-agent-step-progress
std-agent-step-progress.description: Pipeline/workflow step indicator atom. Tracks progress through a series of named steps with start/advance/complete/fail lifecycle. Listens for ADVANCE, COMPLETE, FAIL so orchestrating traits can drive the progress externally.

std-agent-token-gauge.name: std-agent-token-gauge
std-agent-token-gauge.description: Token usage display atom with threshold-based state transitions. Shows current token count, usage percentage, and progress bar. Transitions from normal -> warning -> critical based on configurable thresholds. Provides compact and reset actions.

std-agent-tool-call.name: std-agent-tool-call
std-agent-tool-call.description: Tool execution atom for agent tool invocation. Composes UI atoms (stdModal for invoke form, stdAgentActivityLog for call history) with an agent trait that handles agent/invoke and TOOL_STARTED/TOOL_COMPLETED emits.

std-async.name: std-async
std-async.description: Async operation behavior: idle, loading, success, error. Covers fetch, submit, retry, and polling patterns in one molecule. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-autoregressive.name: std-autoregressive
std-autoregressive.description: Autoregressive text generation molecule (GPT-style). Forward pass in a self-transition loop: generates one token at a time until EOS token or max length is reached.

std-browse.name: std-browse
std-browse.description: Data grid browsing atom. Renders a list of entities with configurable item actions. The browsing view that molecules compose with modal/confirmation atoms.

std-cache-aside.name: std-cache-aside
std-cache-aside.description: Cache management behavior: empty, cached, stale with fetch/invalidate cycle. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-calendar.name: std-calendar
std-calendar.description: Calendar browsing atom with month/day/slot views. Absorbs: calendar-grid, day-cell, time-slot-cell, date-range-selector.

std-circuit-breaker.name: std-circuit-breaker
std-circuit-breaker.description: Circuit breaker pattern behavior: closed, open, halfOpen. Protects services from cascading failures with automatic recovery. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-combat-log.name: std-combat-log
std-combat-log.description: Scrollable combat event log atom using the `combat-log` pattern. Displays timestamped combat events with icons and colors. Supports appending new events and clearing the log.

std-combat.name: std-combat
std-combat.description: Attack cycle behavior: ready, attacking, cooldown, defeated. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-dialogue-box.name: std-dialogue-box
std-dialogue-box.description: RPG dialogue atom using the `dialogue-box` pattern. Shows speaker, portrait, typewriter text, and choices.

fields.name: text
fields.default: Welcome, adventurer. Your journey begins here.

std-display.name: std-display
std-display.description: Read-only display molecule with loading/refresh. Single trait (display is self-contained, no modal atoms needed). Used for dashboards, stats panels, KPIs.

std-filter.name: std-filter
std-filter.description: Filter atom. Shows filter buttons per field with predefined values. Clicking a filter value transitions to filtered state. Clear resets.

std-flip-card.name: std-flip-card
std-flip-card.description: Flip card atom for flashcard-style front/back content. Absorbs: flip-container, flip-card.

std-gallery.name: std-gallery
std-gallery.description: Image gallery atom with carousel browsing and lightbox viewing. Absorbs: carousel, lightbox.

std-game-audio.name: std-game-audio
std-game-audio.description: Game audio provider atom using the `game-audio-provider` pattern. Wraps child content with an audio context, providing sound playback and mute toggling.

std-game-canvas2d.name: std-game-canvas2d
std-game-canvas2d.description: 2D game canvas atom using the `game-canvas-2d` pattern. Provides a render loop with configurable FPS, width, and height. Handles init, start, stop, and per-frame tick events.

std-game-canvas3d.name: std-game-canvas3d
std-game-canvas3d.description: 3D game canvas atom using the `game-canvas-3d` pattern. Renders tiles, units, and features in a 3D scene with configurable orientation, camera mode, grid, shadows, and background color.

std-game-hud.name: std-game-hud
std-game-hud.description: Heads-up display atom. Renders the `game-hud` pattern showing health, score, lives, and other stats.

std-game-menu.name: std-game-menu
std-game-menu.description: Game main menu atom using the `game-menu` pattern. Shows title, subtitle, and menu options (Start, Options, Credits, etc.).

std-game-over-screen.name: std-game-over-screen
std-game-over-screen.description: Game over screen atom using the `game-over-screen` pattern. Shows final score, high score, and retry/quit actions.

std-gameflow.name: std-gameflow
std-gameflow.description: Game state management behavior: menu, playing, paused, gameover. Uses game UI patterns per state: menu     -> game-menu (title, subtitle, Start Game button) playing  -> game-hud (score, level stats) paused   -> game-menu in modal (Resume, Quit buttons) gameover -> game-over-screen (score, Play Again, Main Menu)

std-inventory-panel.name: std-inventory-panel
std-inventory-panel.description: Grid-based inventory atom using the `inventory-panel` pattern. Shows items in a grid with select, use, and drop actions.

std-isometric-canvas.name: std-isometric-canvas
std-isometric-canvas.description: Isometric game renderer atom using the `isometric-canvas` pattern. Renders tiles, units, and features on an isometric grid. Handles tile clicks, unit clicks, and hover events.

std-modal.name: std-modal
std-modal.description: Modal overlay atom. Accepts content injection so molecules can control what renders inside the open state.

std-movement.name: std-movement
std-movement.description: Entity movement behavior: idle, moving, collision detection and resolution. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-overworld.name: std-overworld
std-overworld.description: Map/zone navigation behavior: exploring, transitioning, entered. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-platformer-canvas.name: std-platformer-canvas
std-platformer-canvas.description: Side-scrolling platformer atom using the `platformer-canvas` pattern. Renders player, platforms, and handles movement events.

std-push.name: std-push
std-push.description: External-event subscription atom. Wraps os/watch-http with a lifecycle state machine (idle → subscribed ↔ reconnecting) using emit: config to turn incoming messages + failures into closed-circuit events.

std-quest.name: std-quest
std-quest.description: Quest/objective tracking behavior: available, active, complete, failed. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-rating.name: std-rating
std-rating.description: Rating atom with star-rating input and display. Absorbs: star-rating.

std-related.name: std-related
std-related.description: Relation-walking atom. Fetches the linked entity with include: hydrating a declared relation, emits FETCH_OK on success, renders populated children as a data-list.

std-score-board.name: std-score-board
std-score-board.description: Score display atom using the `score-board` pattern. Shows score, high score, combo, multiplier, level.

std-service-custom-bearer.name: std-service-custom-bearer
std-service-custom-bearer.description: Custom REST API behavior with Bearer token authentication. Tests the schema-level service declaration pattern with bearer auth. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-custom-header.name: std-service-custom-header
std-service-custom-header.description: Custom REST API behavior with header-based API key authentication. Tests the schema-level service declaration pattern (no pre-built integration). Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-custom-noauth.name: std-service-custom-noauth
std-service-custom-noauth.description: Custom REST API behavior with no authentication. Tests the schema-level service declaration pattern for public APIs. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-custom-query.name: std-service-custom-query
std-service-custom-query.description: Custom REST API behavior with query-string API key authentication. Tests the schema-level service declaration pattern with query-based auth. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-email.name: std-service-email
std-service-email.description: Email service integration behavior: compose, send, track delivery status. Wraps the `email` service with call-service for send operations. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-github.name: std-service-github
std-service-github.description: GitHub service integration behavior: idle, creatingPR, prCreated, error. Wraps the `github` integration (listIssues, createPR) with a PR creation flow. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-llm.name: std-service-llm
std-service-llm.description: LLM service integration behavior: generate, classify, summarize text. Wraps the `llm` integration with 4 actions via separate action events. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-oauth.name: std-service-oauth
std-service-oauth.description: OAuth service integration behavior: authorize, token exchange, refresh. Wraps the `oauth` integration with a multi-step authorization flow. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-redis.name: std-service-redis
std-service-redis.description: Redis cache integration behavior: get, set, delete with TTL support. Wraps the `redis` service with separate events for each operation. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-storage.name: std-service-storage
std-service-storage.description: Storage service integration behavior: upload, download, list, delete files. Wraps the `storage` service with separate events for each operation. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-stripe.name: std-service-stripe
std-service-stripe.description: Stripe payment integration behavior: idle, creating, confirming, succeeded, error. Wraps the `stripe` service integration with a multi-step payment flow. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-twilio.name: std-service-twilio
std-service-twilio.description: Twilio messaging integration behavior: compose, send SMS or WhatsApp, track delivery. Wraps the `twilio` service integration with sendSMS and sendWhatsApp operations. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-youtube.name: std-service-youtube
std-service-youtube.description: YouTube service integration behavior: search videos, view video details. Wraps the `youtube` service integration with search and getVideo operations. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-simulation-canvas.name: std-simulation-canvas
std-simulation-canvas.description: 2D physics simulation renderer atom using the `simulation-canvas` pattern. Runs built-in Euler integration for educational presets (pendulum, spring, etc.). Supports start, stop, and reset controls.

std-sort.name: std-sort
std-sort.description: Sort atom. Shows sort-by buttons for each sortable field. Clicking a field name sorts by that field. Clicking again toggles direction.

std-sprite.name: std-sprite
std-sprite.description: Sprite renderer atom using the `sprite` pattern. Renders a single frame from a spritesheet with position and scale. Handles frame changes and click events.

std-tabs.name: std-tabs
std-tabs.description: Tab navigation atom. Uses the `tabs` pattern component with clickable tab headers. Each tab shows different entity data.

std-text-effects.name: std-text-effects
std-text-effects.description: Text animation and highlighting atom. Absorbs: typewriter-text, text-highlight, law-reference-tooltip.

std-theme.name: std-theme
std-theme.description: Theme selection atom with toggle and full selector. Absorbs: theme-toggle, theme-selector.

std-undo.name: std-undo
std-undo.description: Undo/Redo atom using array operators as a stack. - PUSH: appends to undoStack, clears redoStack - UNDO: pops from undoStack, pushes to redoStack - REDO: pops from redoStack, pushes to undoStack - CLEAR: empties both stacks

std-upload.name: std-upload
std-upload.description: File upload atom with drag-and-drop zone and progress tracking. Absorbs: upload-drop-zone.

std-validate-on-save.name: std-validate-on-save
std-validate-on-save.description: OS trigger that watches .orb files and validates them on save. Shows a status dashboard with validation results. Emits AGENT_INTERRUPT with validation results to interrupt autonomous agents with ground truth.

std-wizard.name: std-wizard
std-wizard.description: Multi-step wizard behavior parameterized for any domain. Generates a dynamic number of steps based on the `steps` parameter, with a review screen and completion view. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-agent-fix-loop.statePattern: applying, failed, fixing, idle, succeeded, validating

std-calendar-booking.description: Calendar booking: Calendar view with Modal + Confirmation modals, Calendar composed via @trait.X.

std-puzzle-game.description: Puzzle game molecule. Composes game atoms into a two-trait orbital:

std-quiz.description: Quiz molecule composing flip-card atom with question/answer flow. Absorbs: quiz-block.

std-related-master-detail.description: Relation master-detail: Browse + Related walking a declared relation, composed via @trait.X.

std-sequencer-game.name: std-sequencer-game
std-sequencer-game.description: Educational game molecule: menu -> playing -> complete. Uses the `sequencer-board` pattern for the playing state.

std-service-content-pipeline.description: Content research pipeline molecule. Composes youtube search + llm summarization into a sequential pipeline: search -> select -> summarize.

std-service-custom-api-tester.description: Unified API tester molecule that exercises all 4 custom REST auth patterns (header API key, bearer token, query param API key, no auth) with a tab selector. Single entity, single trait, 4 call events. Pure function: params in, OrbitalDefinition out.

std-service-devops-toolkit.name: std-service-devops-toolkit
std-service-devops-toolkit.description: DevOps toolkit molecule. Three independent traits on a single page sharing one entity via the event bus: - GitHubTrait: PR creation flow (ghIdle -> creatingPR -> prCreated / ghError) - RedisTrait: cache get/set/delete (redisIdle -> redisExecuting -> redisComplete / redisError) - StorageTrait: file upload/download/list/delete (storageIdle -> storageExecuting -> storageComplete / storageError)

std-service-notification-hub.name: std-service-notification-hub
std-service-notification-hub.description: Unified notification sender molecule. Composes email and twilio into a single trait with channel selection (Email, SMS, WhatsApp). A single state machine routes to the appropriate call-service based on the chosen channel.

std-service-payment-flow.name: std-service-payment-flow
std-service-payment-flow.description: Payment flow molecule. Composes stripe payment and email receipt into a single orchestrated flow: pay, then auto-send receipt email.

std-wizard-form.description: Wizard-driven form: Wizard + Input + ValidateOnSave composed via @trait.X (two-hop).

std-agent-assistant.description: Full chat assistant organism. Composes molecule + atoms into a multi-turn conversational agent with memory persistence, context compaction, provider switching, tabbed views, and a memory sidebar drawer.

std-agent-builder.name: std-agent-builder
std-agent-builder.description: Schema builder agent organism. Full build cycle that plans, generates, validates, and fixes .orb programs. Composes planner + tool-loop + fix-loop molecules with session management and tabbed views.

std-agent-pipeline.description: Multi-step pipeline organism. Composes planner + tool-loop molecules with session management, step progress tracking, and a session tree drawer.

std-agent-reviewer.name: std-agent-reviewer
std-agent-reviewer.description: Schema/code reviewer organism. Composes RAG molecule + classifier atom to classify input, search for relevant patterns, recall best practices, and generate structured review output with tabbed views and an issues browse.

std-agent-tutor.name: std-agent-tutor
std-agent-tutor.description: Teaching assistant organism. Composes conversation + memory + classifier atoms with tabbed views and a concept browse list. Classifies student level, recalls prior learning from memory, generates explanations with context-aware difficulty, and tracks concept strength.

std-api-gateway.description: API gateway management organism. Composes: stdList(Route) + stdCircuitBreaker(Backend) + stdDisplay(Analytics)

std-finance-tracker.description: Finance tracker organism. Composes: stdList(Transaction) + stdDisplay(FinanceSummary) + stdDetail(FinanceReport)
